revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:R to numerals]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 381 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to numerals |name=To numeral(s) |from=a title that includes the [[Numeral (linguistics)|word form]] of a number (or numbers) |to=an article with the [[Number|mathematical symbol]] of the number in its title |main category=Redirects to numerals |printworthy=no }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to numerals |name=To numeral(s) |from=a title that includes the [[Numeral (linguistics)|word form]] of a number (or numbers) |to=an article with the [[Number|mathematical symbol]] of the number in its title |main category=Redirects to numerals |printworthy=no }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
